stemHtml: Using the pulse technique, what determines the minimum range and the maximum unambiguous range of a primary radar?

options.a: Minimum range: transmission frequency, maximum range: size of reflecting surface
options.b: Minimum range: rotation speed of antenna, maximum range: length of the time base
options.c: Minimum range: pulse length, maximum range: pulse repetition frequency
options.d: Minimum range: transmission frequency, maximum range: transmitter power output
